song.title: Rivers of Living Water
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Rivers of living water, Rivers that flow from the throne, Rivers o’er-flowing with blessing, Coming from Jesus alone.
[C] Chorus Rivers of living water, Rivers of life so free, Flowing from Thee, my Savior, Send now the rivers through me.
[V2] 2) Whoso is thirsty come hither, Here is abundant supply; Water transparent as crystal, Come without money and buy.
[V3] 3) Cleanse me, oh, cleanse me, my Savior, Make me a channel today; Empty me, fill me and use me, Teach me to trust and obey.
[V4] 4) Then, and then only, Lord Jesus, Through me the rivers can flow; Thus and thus only will others Learn Thy great fulness to know.
[V5] 5) Now I surrender to Jesus, Here I lay all at His feet; Anything, anywhere only, Just for His service made meet!
song.author: Geroge R. H. Wood
